1 2 3 4
A) i iv ii i
B) iii iv i ii
C) iii i iv ii
D) iv iii ii i
13.1.3 Adaptation
29. Any attributes of the organism that enable
them to survive and reproduce its habitat
is known as (Pg. 225, E)
A) Migration B) Diapause
C) Adaptation D) Dormancy
30. Kangaroo rat in American deserts
is capable to meet all its water requirement
through . (Pg. 225, E)
A) East, internal fat oxidation
B) North, internal fat oxidation
C) North, internal protein oxidation
D) West, internal fat oxidation
31. Desert plants have special photosynthetic
pathway which is known as-(Pg. 225, E)
A) C3 cycle B) C4 cycle
C) CAM pathway D) None of these
32. Desert plant do not have following one
characteristics-
A) Bread leaf B) Flattened stem
C) Sunken stomata D) Thick cuticle
33. Mammals from Colder climates generally
have shorter ears and limbs to minimize
the heat loss. This Rule was give by-
(Pg. 226, E)
A) Charles Darwin B) Jansely
C) P. Odum D) Allen
34. Desert lizard manage to keep their body
temperature constant by means.
(Pg. 226, E)
A) Physiological B) Behavioural
C) Chemical D) Both A and B
35. Many marine aquatics lives in very high
pressure. Which type of adaptation shown
by them? (Pg. 226, E)
A) Biochemical B) Behaviourals
C) Physical D) None of these
36. Altitude sickness in high altitude is due to-
